original: One of the naleen brothers holds the left flank of the jungle against you and Azra. He appears genuinely irritated by your presence, his ears flat back against his jet-black hair. His claws and fangs are clearly visible, brandished in an attempt to cow you into submission by threat alone. Behind him, his tail swishes angrily. A satchel bounces on his far hip, and judging by the way he holds it, he wants to keep it far from your reach.
